_comment: Season-average CASH price outlook ($/bu) by marketing year. All figures are from FREE public sources — no subscription needed. USDA WASDE is the official season-average forecast; the analysts we follow (Pro Farmer, StoneX/Suderman, ISU/Chad Hart) mostly comment on it in their free public content rather than publishing their own clean season-average number. Populate a source's corn/soybeans values when it publicly states a distinct figure; leave null to show a directional lean only. The dashboard averages all non-null values into the consensus. Edit as new forecasts print.

sources.name: USDA WASDE
sources.cite: May 2026 WASDE (via Southern Ag Today / StoneX)
sources.note: Official season-average farm price. First 2026/27 print was the May WASDE.

sources.name: StoneX — Arlan Suderman
sources.note: Grain stocks came in below expectations; if it persists USDA may revise production lower — tilts supportive. Add StoneX price targets here.

sources.name: ISU Extension — Chad Hart
sources.note: Season-average prices below break-even (~$5 corn, ~$12.27 soy) — margins challenged. Add Hart's outlook figures here.

sources.name: Pro Farmer
sources.note: Crop-tour yields + free marketing articles. Add a price figure here if they state one publicly.
